item.title: AI Needs a Place to Land
item.description: ## COMPUTEX 2026 and Taiwan’s shift from supply chain to co-design and deployment marketplace*AI Infrastructure Notes｜Article 4*Sinclair HuangField Note v4 — updated with GTC Taipei and statistical-sc
